citations.description: Search for 'mcp-auth.md' across entire repo returned no matches.
docs/README.md lists all doc files; mcp-auth.md is not among them.

findings.criterion: docs/mcp-auth.md (S7) documents that auth_custom_import is a trusted operator config value that executes code at load.
findings.detail: The file docs/mcp-auth.md does not exist anywhere in the repository. A filesystem search confirms no file named mcp-auth.md is present under docs/ or anywhere else. While the acceptance criterion explicitly labels this as '(S7)' — indicating the ticket author delegates documentation to story S7 — the criterion is listed as an AC of this ticket and the file is absent from the codebase.
findings.remediation: Create docs/mcp-auth.md (as part of S7) and include a section documenting that auth_custom_import is a trusted operator config value that executes arbitrary code at load time, linking it from the main docs index.

data.remediation: How to resolve the unmet criteria: for each one, decide whether the work is genuinely incomplete or simply undocumented. If a requirement is already satisfied but the proof is not discoverable from the code alone, add a comment to this ticket that documents the evidence — cite the concrete artifacts that meet the requirement (file paths and line ranges, commands and their output, links, or the reasoning that ties the work to the criterion). The completion verifier reads this ticket's comments, so evidence you record there is taken into account on the next verification. For any criterion whose work is genuinely unfinished, complete it, then re-verify.
